changelog: Script Editor with syntax highlighting, line numbers, autocomplete, and live error annotations (CodeMirror)
Script Editor Run button - Compile, upload, and run scripts directly from the editor
Optimized script generator with pattern decoders for smaller bytecode within 8KB EEPROM budget
Sync budget tracking - See EEPROM usage before uploading
Rewrote Maestro compiler with correct Pololu Mini Maestro opcodes
Replaced alert dialogs with non-blocking toast notifications
Added OPT badge for sequences using optimized encoding

1.note: Debug images available - contact for download links
